login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Welcome back
login.testimonial: "Since switching to Alpis, our mean time to resolution dropped by 38%. The SLA automation alone saved us two hours of manual work per day."
login.failed: Login failed. Check your credentials and try again.
login.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.

up in minutes.

benefits: Email, SLA, and audit logs included

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send a reset link.
forgotPassword.successMessage: If an account exists for that address, a password reset link has been sent. Check your spam folder if it doesn't arrive within a few minutes.

resetPassword.invalidMessage: This reset link is missing a token. Request a new one.
resetPassword.title: Set new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Must be at least 8 characters.
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been reset. Redirecting to sign in…
resetPassword.failed: Password reset failed. The link may have expired — request a new one.

verifyEmail.successMessage: Your email address has been confirmed. You can now sign in.
verifyEmail.errorFallback: This link may have expired or already been used.
verifyEmail.noTokenMessage: This verification link is missing a token.

acceptInvite.invalidMessage: This link is missing a token. Ask your admin to resend the invite.
acceptInvite.title: Set your password
acceptInvite.subtitle: Create a password to activate your account.
